creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is an old habit in some places: it means that the script must be sourced, not run, and if someone wants to run it, it would exit with a bad return code.

Note: this is not for my own scripts, but in a new port that I am preparing. Of course, I could patch it, but why patch a legit thing, if upstream is doing it this way?
